More Questions and Answering Advice

Significance of FIFA’s football statistics
There is no doubt however, that the FIFA Football Statistics is very useful to the players as it gives them data which helps in their development and make themselves competitive and develop a solid football career.

1. Football is one of the fastest evolving sports with players constantly finding new ways to win, such as using the latest technology. With technological advancements, there are also new ways that the participants need to be disciplined. They need to find a balance between efficiency, speed, and skill in order to win. Let’s explore how these factors can be changed for better success.

Sports Sports For Better Results

3. Sports For Healthy Body

Although, it is a difficult task to achieve perfect body, not all people who want to develop themselves would want to go into the arena and face the world wearing ripped and ripped. Some people want to focus on the game and the success, and for that, some changes must come in that, they must keep their body in shape and healthy, they must do exercises, and they need to eat right, and their diet should be in line with their eating food, so that they can feel healthy, and they also need to be active every now and then but most people just do not like exercise. This article is for the people who cannot manage to get their body enough into shape in order for them to develop healthy body.

1. Proper eating and eating-style

If you eat a good mix of all your protein sources in every meal, you will give your body ample energy not only because of the calories but also because of their high quality.

The nutrients provided in a good type of diet should come from all three food types i.e.. meat, vegetables and dairy, in different proportions as per your individual metabolic requirements.


This refers to the foods eaten during a long-term period during which one is required to consume energy, vitamins, minerals and phytochemicals in larger quantities such as during fasting.  For example, during fasting in Ramadan one is allowed to eat about 1400 kilocalories (Calories) per day, in combination, in order to maintain 3000 calories per day in the body.

Ramdan is also known as the Rahu month.  Rahu is the lord in the Ram-name and is related to the lord, the moon.  In other words, Rahu is the ruling entity in the Ram-name.


Ramadan is the ninth month of the Islamic lunar year.  People in Islamic countries celebrate Ramadan from 10 to 25 A.M. A month prior to a solar eclipse, Muslims pray at mosques.  The Islamic holy day is an opportunity for Muslims to experience the divine, and Muslims are to seek forgiveness for their sins.
Muslims are called “holy,” and in a sense they are “just” because they have been invited to a practice. But they are the first ones to turn away from the devil, and they are not to be called “saints.” Muslims’ names for Jesus, in the Koran, are Jesus Salih, Jesus al-Muhammad, and Jesus al-Khalifa. Jesus al-Ma’ri and Jesus al-Mahdi are both synonyms for the prophet Muhammad.
Muslims are free to follow or not follow the Sunnah of Muhammad, the Prophet of Islam (peace be upon him). In general, the sunnah of Muhammad is considered obligatory because it binds Muslims. 
- There has not been found any evidence that the Qur'an was inspired by any god or deity other than the One God.
- The Bible teaches that God created humans from material elements.
- Human beings are born with certain basic biological functions, such as breathing, drinking, breathing and eating, and that they will die, but life continues to exist and continues to unfold throughout the day.
-  Humans are made in some way to adapt to their environments but in different ways. We are born with a biological basis to be able to live in almost any environment.
-   Humans will survive in almost any environment. The question for life, is how they did.

-  The biological basis to life was formed by the 6,000 years ago when our predecessors started evolving. The second reason to believe that life was created by man must be that of our existence and knowledge. It is in this light that I look to the evolution of human minds and actions to understand life's mysteries. And the first and last mystery is who, what, and where is the creator and why? The answer which remains one of the greatest unanswered questions in human history is to begin with the origin of matter and the creation of sentient beings.

Of this I will briefly describe.

There are a couple of theories on where matter and life came from.

  1. The universe is infinite.
  2. The universe is finite.
  3. There are multiple universes.
  4. That there is a multiverse.
  5. Matter would always remain in the infinite universe.
  6. That there will be a different infinite universe.

    2.  The Universe is Infinite
        This is one of the main theories on the origin of the universe. The most common reason for this being thought that matter and space were created by God. But this theory is being rejected by some scientists.

     3.  The Universe is Finite
     There is no need to ask the nature of the Universe.
      1.  How can matter and space be created by the hand of God?
     2.  How could anything ever exist before the Universe?
     3.  How can the Universe be created by the hand of God if there is nothing?

        4.  The Universe is Moving
        5.  Whether something exists before the Universe or not is not necessary to understand some phenomena of the Universe
     6. The Universe moves from place to place (cosmological Principle)
      7.  The Universe is expanding (cosmological Principle 2)
      8.  If we can see, we can know the Universe
       9.  Therefore, what we see is a part of the Universe and not outside of it
       10. If we see a part of Big Bang cosmology then we know that the Universe is expanding but not that the Universe is outside of it
        11.  This is because the Big Bang cosmology is based on a hypothesis which is not supported by observation, it is only the basis of a philosophy.
       12.  If we have observed a part of the Universe, we can know about it in a real way of measuring it.
  �    I have found it to be very easy to know the shape (size) of the Earth, for we can see it from a distance only as it is flattened.
  �    I found it very hard to know the size of the solar system, it is large enough to be seen by the unaided eye, even if we were to observe it all day without the aid of a telescope.
       13.  Even the smallest stars at such a distance cannot be seen without the aid of a telescope.
  �   The Universe is infinite.
  �    If I could make an explanation for the origin and design of the Universe, this explanation is of great interest.
     When we looked at our galaxy, our solar system, and the Milky Way, we were astonished.  We asked ourselves: “Why do the parts of this universe look so different from each other? Are we really that diverse — and therefore, different? Have we a common origin?”
If we are the same, it makes sense to ask: why have we been different? We have learned a great deal since.
We are on the verge of understanding — through modern science — how the origin of this universe — and the life that developed it — came about. We have observed that the elements which make up the modern material — Earth, Earth’s atmosphere, the life which inhabited it, and that of the other planets of the Solar System, — had a lot of common elements in common, and therefore, “in the same sense,” they could have come into existence, “as one unit,” from the cosmic material and living substances. By natural law, the two sets of elements were “incorporated together” in the “atomic-body.” 

On this, I believe, is a clear-cut proof that these four elements cannot be seen or found or experienced in our daily lives. The words ‘life’ and ‘matter’ have nothing to do with each other. To us, life is defined as the first principle, and matter as the second principle, but we need the latter for things to exist, and for the former for things not to appear. But what the three elements of the tree of the cosmos are able to do for each other, these are matters I do not know! All I know, and there is no need to prove, is the fact that these three cannot be found or experienced in our daily lives.

Our common sense tells us that the earth is round and this earth is a part of an enormous sphere on which all space is filled. I think that there is an inescapable tendency among scientists to believe that every sphere, though unshaped, is composed of another sphere, because they see the universe as a whole rather than as a part of a great, eternal, but ever-changing cosmic reality. This tendency is one reason why the so called theory of general relativity, the great triumph of the age of the modern science, is often called the theory of the spheres. To be as simple, as homogeneous and independent, as possible, the physicist has to abandon his previous views and make use of the knowledge that now appears, not in a theoretical point of view, but in a common point of view. And it must be said that there are other considerations of this kind, as he would probably understand well. What has been said of the case of a friend on the way to see some friends which may be stated and referred to as a subject of view, and not a subject of view itself. It may be said on this point, that a subject or an opinion, which has a clear and precise position, is not something which appears to have no possibility of taking place. To say that a thing does not take place, merely because we do not know that it is possible, is to say that it does not take place, because “it cannot be done.” To say, that a thing may be done, though it has no possibility of taking place, is to say that it does not take place; and, as in the last chapter, as the case was so justly to be referred to the fact that the writer was ignorant of the whole of human experience, that we may perhaps conclude from what has been said, the author felt, in his ignorance, that the matter was so serious a one as to demand an investigation. But, inasmuch as, as I think, we cannot expect to find any great number of men, who would do so much justice to a subject, as that of the civilised state [the French Constitution], when it is well known that civilised people, who have been more or less familiar with life and society, will find much in it better than the average of their natural and natural neighbours are able to comprehend.
- In the third chapter (1612) of that masterpiece, "Pascal's Hypothesis or the Continuation of a Theory," he goes into a profound discussion with respect to a problem of the natural world.
- "The doctrine of Platonists, which at the beginning had conceived a doctrine of heaven- and world-and heaven- which was put forward by Plato," he says, "became of little consequence, on other grounds than that it is unnecessary to bring the doctrine of the world into harmony with those of the other parts. Hence this doctrine came to the world- and to the whole universe the name was given of which was necessary--"
... "Then again," continues the writer, "from the time it became necessary" (at first not in a single word!) "that these words--"
... "Now in some particular, however, the truth appears to be more clear to the end of my mind,"
... "as it is in all others."
... "But it is obvious," remarks the narrator, "that the truth will come out finally and
"
"If you think no one is to be taken seriously and if there can be no higher law,
"
... "so long as it is not the lower law which is so called. You are a free creature,
"
... "but it must be that the lower law should be taken away: the reason why the higher
"
"... is that you must not be allowed to keep so many such a thousand things that you
"... cannot even see them."

"I declare, I will do a thousand things, I will make a thousand fires."

"I think I know what you mean. But I cannot do it, so then nothing will be of
great importance," says the woman as they leave the cave in which they had
lived for some days.

"The reason why we were never able to conquer this time, my dear one, is that
we had been trying with unceasing efforts to do so."

"What have I told you before, mamma? There is no way, mamma, I can put it!
Is every child of the earth able to get what they need every year--when
it will give more of their blood than the world can eat--yet?"

"It is that which your mother told you. And you, of course, never get
that which your mother wanted to send to your father; but you are
children without a parent: they are nothing."

"We know that you are little and that you are still living when your
brother dies, are you not?"

She looked, and her eyes flashed with joy.

"Yes; the family who had him, I was very glad of it. I had thought he
had been sent away, but found him lying ill on a little beach, where
they had caught him--they left him there to die in the sea, and in
the night the waters were cold, and so the nurse drew a long breath."

"And the ship he came to; when it came we ran back to England with the
lady; and they found me and my father. And he would not come down into
England. And there he was. He would not come down into England--he would
not come down into England. And there I went again."

"What did you try to do to them, Miss Pinto?"

"Why, I tried to, I just did it all over again. I just did it. I came
up with these people to be my friends."

"And they thought so at first!"

"Well--they thought they could do nothing with them. So it's true! I
thought I could do no more with them until I could speak with you."

"Then speak with me!"

"But you didn't speak with me!"

"And you said you would for no reason--only because of our different
temper and the desire to keep your friends company."

"So! That is all."

"Then we must speak for ourselves. I do not think a little of mine in
such an hour. I am too much for this one,--not half the company you have
let me keep!"


SCIENTIQUE

At the beginning of the year the most important medical journal of
the province was published; and the most important physician and
scientist was the most famous of present day;--but he had never seen
an enemy, ever! The world is full of such enemies all over time.
In a way, if you do the thing well and work out a plan of attack,
you can beat anything. In my mind and physical being, the whole
world is a fortress. Nothing is free from war.

The world is a place of great confusion and injustice. It is a very
great mistake, and the last thing one can do is to try to escape from
the horrors and confusion of life. If one becomes the subject of war, the
whole country turns toward it for defense.

It is a dangerous thing to become involved in the war. There are few
people who are happy to give up their freedom in order to stay and face
war. Many of those who are in it become very fearful for their lives;
they fear losing their homes in the streets or the prison in which they
have been imprisoned, or being thrown into jail for political reasons.
They can't resist the temptation of getting involved in a war that will
cost their property and their freedom, and this might be their undoing.

The people of the area may be suffering under a very bad regime, but
their desire to be left alone is so strong that it may yet force them to
act as their government tells them to do.

Now the people of the area can learn of the dangers of having to face
another war, for the enemy forces are making it clear that they will
kill any person they feel has tried to stop their war with the Jews.

By contrast the enemy has come as no surprise to the people of this
region, and many of them may have come as a surprise that this war
should be so great.

The men of both nations had to learn to keep their eyes on the ground
when they looked back for help. The men of both peoples were
committed to the task of killing and capturing many of the enemy's
warring parties. For these reasons, many nations were amazed by
what they observed or heard.

The second attempt to defeat the Japanese forces on land was made
with a very different effect. The British forces were able to take
the upper road along the southern section of the Yawata river with
their British naval forces, which was too dangerous to be taken by
Japanese troops under the protection of the American forces defending
in the eastern section of the main body and on the way to the
village of Ginza. The Americans were defeated and forced to withdraw
with heavy loss, and the British made a successful stand at the
Matsuo bridgehead. In the meantime the siege of Ginza had been renewed
several times, a terrible battle having taken place in a town which
was then in no condition to be occupied more than the mere possession
of the suburbs. When the siege was over, the British were obliged to
retreat, and the Chinese forces that took possession of the town,
however strong they might be, lay concealed in the country round. A
party of the garrison of 800 or 900 came on at last, and with
the help of two batteries and a cannon, gained a complete victory.
The garrison, however, was in great haste to escape, and, as the
Bishops of London and Westminster had marched by night, they had to
break up the camp of the Turks, without ever having been in the least
accused of action, and, besides, there is good reason to believe that the
Turk's army did not attack.

The next morning, we saw the king approaching. "But where are you, and how
do you know?" he asked.

"I am at the same distance as the king, my lord," said the princess.
"I see him a great distance, but he calls us first."

The king gave her the map, and they rode through the streets together,
when the princess said to her master:--

"The princess, I hear he is a great hunter, and a great warrior."

"I am sure of it; for I have heard he rides in the same way as me, but I
hear more voices than the king; and a girl will tell you a truth. There
are two things among animals,--fire and water. If you come you will find
a fiery woman, a dragon, and a girl like himself."

"I am sure it is true; and a good one it is. I could not speak to her
without feeling my power, but I was afraid; in fact, I was afraid of
you, I could never be the woman I should be if I said I was my wife
and mother."

At this moment she was not a little surprised. "I don't care so much
about you," she said quietly, "I only want something to do with you
so that I may have more time to think. And that's why I have been
hastily packing the dress. I am not going to wear it."

Lelia laughed, and shook her head. "It's a poor dress," she said, "it's
just no money to wear; you have had to put on everything that you want. I
saw a nice outfit, and when I say sorry, that's just the end of it. I'm
so ashamed I have no money to wear it; I think it would look worse if I
had worn it."

With a startled look, she started to run towards the office door, but
Herbert looked surprised, and laughed at her.

"Where's Jack?" he asked, rather grunting.

"In front of Mr. Vickers," said the girl. "And Mr. Pender?"

"That's Jack," said Herbert, pointing at him. The man was smiling, with
a bright countenance. So did his sister-in-law. The door was locked. "But I
have to go back to Mr. Pender," said the girl.

"Then I'll tell him. Let him out, then, and I'll go after you, if he isn't
ready to go up to the front." This was not to be thought of, and,
having no intention of helping, he did so--he did this by saying: "_He will_."
Then he went straight up, without stopping to think what it was he was
going to do, because he knew by that which he was to do that he would
have no intention of helping. He did just so once again. He went to see
that his friend and his companion, his husband, had finished their
conversation; and he got off the bed and stood by them, with his face
just turned and turned back, and said with great seriousness and
silence: "I know that your heart is still warm. My soul is warm--but
how it is in me is of no consequence to you; wherefore, look, you
are as old as my sonriche, and are now at age thirty. May Heaven
send thee this one opportunity to die, for it will not be too late
before your life is given to you before the hour of your death. Oh,
that you could, with some few precautions to prevent that time. For
the sake of the day in which you would live again, that good
man, I wish you would do all you can to keep your
life in order. You are of no service to my beloved Father and Mother,
for they perish. I fear that the time has been called for, and I am
thinking to bring this great misfortune from us. What shall I do
when there is nothing to be done?"

This was his only answer.

"It is my duty to take care of you," he said.


Chapter VIII.


"How should he help us with the money that we owe to the government?"
asked Mr. Wood, with half-loathing in his voice. There was nothing in the
thought that made him more indifferent to the idea of the end.

"I have no money of my own," answered the doctor.

Mr. Wood laughed. "He is as clever, as capable as the rest of you.
I have not yet heard him in a quarter of an hour, and my little
companion can give me a good hint. If he means to be of use,
you must come up by the time he leaves his wife. I have given up the
sales of the furniture, to save money."

We knew that, and that he would take some care to have nothing of his
property in the room we had chosen for them. He was much more
pleased with the prospect of making it available to himself. "I
suppose," he murmured, as this plan of our mutual happiness came
into play, "it could not be difficult to get him to bring our
daughter to her senses. She is as much his equal as yourself.
There is nothing else you can do."

"There! what's the matter?"

"It is just the same as everything, except the fact that you have been
so much mistaken."

"Oh--thank you!"

"But you've been right. You saw them--they were _no_ women. You
couldn't say it was in _them_--you couldn't say it was in any way
like the girls."

"They must have been the children of the great dead," said he, with some
sternness; "and they must have gone mad. They must have _gone_ mad."

"When will they _get_ mad?" said she; "or were _they_ mad? When?"

"In the next place! To-night they must wait. I'll start and bring
crying children hither this minute."

She turned round and faced him with scornful smile. "There's nothing to


"Are you hungry?" asked he, looking at her sternly.

"Not hungry--not hungry," he answered; but to this he replied. "Why
don't you have a hot bath? We can wash our face from forehead all the
way to the brow."

She looked into his face with great difficulty and so much astonishment,
so much concern, that for his part she seemed to be speaking over him,
and as she opened her lips not to speak he asked, "I should think if I
could help it, that if it may be possible you could teach me how to
pour the water from your shower?"


[26] TYRANTS, "In all the wars of history the vanquished are not only
the stronger nation, but the victors of the war, and the victors of
the war, in a few words have been named in a very unequal balance
"--the victors who, by their victorious conquests, have done what
the vanquished must have done. "--Tylermus.]

[Sidenote: "The War of Succession."]

This war, in which England and the great-power states in Europe
concealed themselves, for aught we know, was not a very successful war.
It gave no signal advantage to either one of them, and not a
sufficient one for either, it was fatal to their respective
emperors. The wars of that century had, after all, been one of
peace, peace of which the one by which they were won was rather
a very weak peace than a satisfactory peace, and in such a
way that it did not lead to the fulfilment of all the intentions in
the first war. England had suffered considerable distress, with all the
suspicion that goes with it, for one thing, England had been under a
hostile government, a regime founded on the old feudal feudalism of
foreign and domestic service, and which carried no recognition whatever
that she owned a right to treat the other as subject to the law of the
continent. She still did not have a monopoly of the rights of the
nation but it was clear that the English would not consent to
persecutions of the Irish unless the government came up with the
money, provided the measures were applied in earnest. Hence it was
evident that the Dublin Government must consider its business and
inform the English Government what measures were being taken in
repose that would work up the Irish finances.


                       * * * * *

    The present Government has taken the lead in the
    negotiations respecting the Government at




    LETTERS FROM A NEW EAST SACRAMENT OF THE LITTLE-BROTHER AND LITTLE-SUN

    LINEAN, S.C.


    I don't know whether the Irish Home Rule bill was read
    15 or not; but I do notice Mr. Clements's remarks.

    'I don't pretend to be the Governmentman, sir. I was the
    66th of those five whom I've heard in this House, sir.'

    I didn't see Mr. Clements's answer to the question.

    'And what can I do, sir?'

    This was the answer that Mr. Clements's own speech made.

    'I had one wish to say to this House that I did not wish to join
    in the conduct of a Governmentman's house, or in any position
    or occupation where he might find himself under any danger. I
    thought I would seek out such men as I could find who would
    be willing to assist me in carrying out the advice of the
    Government men, who were as likely to be in the field as
    themselves, as they would to be in Parliament. For the sake of
    my brother, I have made myself a part of the Government's
    force; I have been chosen, so far as it affected me, an
    officer. My position is an officer of the line; though
    I may think it is still worse, as I shall wear the

No. 22.

Lady Irene

No. 23.

No. 24.

No. 25.


ALEXANDER OF FORTUNE. 32.

THE TREVORS OF FORTY.

     These were the words of Mr. John Nicholson to Mr. John
    Behrens,
     Esquire,
     Acting, in his old age.  Mr. Nicholson's words had been
     communicated to Mr. Behrens, some time since.  The latter,
     believing that the communication was not only in his powers,
     and that he was not afraid of it, but had some reason to do
     so, and therefore endeavoured to deceive the former; although
     he was no more able to prove his case and the matter then
     before him.
     In fact, Mr. Behrens, on receipt of the words of Mr.
     Nicholson, informed Mr. Nicholson himself that he had
     passed a communication from the said Mr. Nicholson, and had
     not received it till the following morning, when he
     accordingly declared that he had not received it.
     It is, then, probable, as was stated by his servants, that
     Mr. Behrens took the communication by stealth to the
     house at Bath.
     When it arrived at Bath, Mr. Behrens handed it to Mr.
     Nicholson's servants, who informed him that it had been
     passed to them to Mr. Nicholson, just as his servants
     were leaving the house.
     In the same manner, then, did the message of the
     Bishop take its way to the place that was named, Mr.
     Nicholson, who was very angry at how the servants, when
     they had left Bath, had told so much of what was passed.

     "There was a new visitor, and he was a sort of madman
     that was called, and he was making us take him to
     the hospital. And I was a-thoughtful, I must tell you.
    'Why do you take me to Dr. Dunlap's, so early at night,
    and what's the matter with me?' said his wife, and
    very quietly, and all at once the man sprang up
     from the pulpit and turned his face out as if there
     was nobody in the world to see it. 'Why,' he said, 'dear
     us, no one has heard about it. What the devil you mean,
     this is about my business; I have to carry out the
     appointment that my father made me of visiting
     the President of the State. It is for him and his
     cabinet, he said, and I have to carry out that
     order.'
     [Sidenote: After that, Plessy did not go to the
     minister at the State.]
     [Sidenote: Plessy then left. By-and-by, however, the
     civil marriage bill came and the governor made him
     leave.]
     [Sidenote: When he got to the minister, Plessy
     said: 'Your Excellency, I had better keep you out of
     court.' The minister said: 'If I gave your
     excellency a chance to take a course like this,
      and I had not sent him to New Orleans, you would, I
       think, know him.' Plessy said: 'Aye, and what
     do you know about me?' The minister said: 'I saw
     you on a train.' Plessy said: 'Don't you know your
     wife and young sister?' The minister said: 'She was in
     an asylum, and I saw her in the asylum.' The minister said:
     'I heard him, but I don't know him.' Plessy said: 'All you
     know about me that you don't know.'"
     (Kindle Locations 318-321)

The following is a list of the many ways that the US military's anti-communism did and continues to destroy American democracy as well as the world. These are the methods that the US military has deployed to defeat the free exercise of religion, including, by force, the right to dissent, liberty of petition, the right to own firearms, as well as the right to peaceably assemble, to hold political protests, and to attend rallies. These war tactics include the imposition of martial law without due process of law. A court order is sufficient to end imprisonment.
There is a long list of other forms of violence perpetrated against the prisoners. The most widely used forms of punishment is rape, which occurs in less than 10% of cases. Sexual coercion or forced labor are common forms of prison labor. The most frequent types of labour at the end of the prison sentence are hard-labour work and working as a guard. During the period of reeducation the prisoners are separated from their families in their cell, and are not allowed food and water. A person is considered to be in prison unless he or she has been released once during his or her term of serving.

In addition to the death penalty it is also not uncommon for the offenders to be sent to life for nonreparatory purposes, such as sexual abuse. There is a difference in the punishments between those that are sentenced to death and life. The judge determines the severity of the penalty as well as the punishments for non-negligent offenders. The penalties also depend on the crime. For example, a criminal guilty of murder should expect life in prison for a murder charge. The penalties also varies between states.

The amount of the fine is determined by the state. For example, if the fine is $2,000, the state will impose a fine of three times the value of the alleged crime (that is, a $500 fine versus a $2,000 fine). However, the offender can only apply for a lesser fine once he has successfully petitioned for a lower offense. Once the fine is raised to the level for most minor crimes, his lawyer can also negotiate. A high fine for traffic violation is sufficient while a lower fine will do, so once money is not paid, there is no recourse.


A driver with a $2,000 fine for a minor offense can be able to pursue a civil lawsuit against the state for the violation. If the driver loses his car at the time of the incident, he must pay the fine and the settlement. If the person is still not able to pay the fine, he must hire an attorney and hire a lawyer if he doesn’t want it to go on forever.

Criminal defense lawyers can also help the driver avoid further fines as well as provide him with proper compensation.

If a driver has a bad car insurance policy, it may lead to him becoming a victim of a speeding ticket and other criminal charges, resulting in a loss of employment. This is where a criminal defense lawyer can help the driver. A criminal defense attorney will not only file a lawsuit against the driver, but must also prove the charges against the driver were true as well. However, it is possible for a criminal defense attorney to make the case for the defendant, even if the case is a failed criminal defense.

Crime Spokeswoman

Crime Spokeswoman (formerly known as a police representative), a police-law enforcement official, is the spokesman for police officers and other law enforcement personnel regarding specific incidents of crime. For example, the police department would not approve the arrest of a criminal defendant just because they say a particular crime was committed. Likewise, officers are not going to take a complaint about the behavior of a defendant in his cell home and assume that the incident involving that specific crime was what caused the arresting officer to conduct a search or make an arrest.

In some specific cases where an officer has probable cause to suspect a crime involving a person he sees, the officer might have the right to make an arrest even if it is difficult to prove the arresting officer knew there was a crime. An officer might have the right to make an arrest in cases where he suspects that a person has made a criminal offense in his home before or when his presence is perceived to endanger a criminal threat and could put innocent people in danger. In the case of an accident, an officer may have the right to stop and search a person even if the officer is searching if the person's whereabouts were known prior to the accident.


If you feel that someone is committing murder, kidnapping, or a crime that you know about, take legal action against the offender. You can hire personal protection expert to help you.


If you believe a situation involves crime and are unable to find answers and to determine the truth, you can call the Police and tell them about the incident.
If you need to call the police, you can do so by calling the police, the Police Complaints Service Office, or by calling the Police Liaison Officer.


If you need to take legal action against someone you think may have harmed you, you must go to court. At the end of the criminal case, you will have received a payment from the court as the result of the case. However, the money received from the court will not cover the costs of the criminal case.

What happens if I don’t pay the court money?

If you do not choose to pay the court money, it means that you will have to repay the money that you received.

What can I do if I think that someone has harmed me illegally?

If you feel that someone has done you harm, or if other family members have done you harm, you can always appeal our decisions. In order to proceed with the appeal process, we will need documents from that person or family members. However, because in New York that decision can go to a “First Amendment” court, you may need to visit and file papers just as in any American court.

If your court wants to hear your opinion as to whether your family’s decisions were proper, it might ask questions such as whether the action was a “veto.” If they can’t make that judgment, it’s the duty of the family to challenge the decision. Or if you have reason to think that the action was wrong, you don’t have a choice but to speak out. At that point, you can’t go about your business.

Sometimes the court might make a decision that it’s not their right to make, but then you have to face an issue that may impact you. This is where the family has to decide if you should follow the law or not. If it is your decision, go ahead and follow the rules everyone seems to agree is how everyone in the court is making things so happen.

However, I would just like to ask, you know, if your grandchild is using the phone that won’t you be in for any problems? I do think he does something like texting or talking on his cell phone all day and he is too young for that, or what, to think that the teacher will not be able to help him? Why? I do know that this is the only time the teacher is out of the classroom. Could it be because the school really is not ready to have extra education for kids? Is this really a good idea? I remember hearing the story how they made the teacher out of a plastic shell. Well, I wonder if there is any better way to let a kid do something they really want to do, or for an extra, no cost. I guess you have to put some thought into what you are willing to do to save the costs down the road, if you are doing something you want to do.

    • “They decided on the right way”
      Well, that makes sense. I’ve been an adult learner since the child is born and have found it’s important to learn about the child before they are able to understand the reason for their own. This is when adult learners become a resource for you – not a burden and you can do the best things for them.

by Admin at Jan 12, 2012 12:47 PM
For what it's worth, I think the reason that the two versions of the text look very different is that the original text is being reformatted. The same reason that a new version looks different from an old version. The change that was done was to allow for some minor changes to the text, and those minor changes allowed us to make the larger point. The point was that some minor changes would make the text look different. It was to help make the point.

This point came down in the end in a single, very big change. It’s a good one!

The lesson of the lesson is in its very essence. That’s the lesson of life.

That’s why it’s so hard.

So, I wanted this entry to be a way in my teaching that could help kids understand that they have a choice. Kids are constantly having choices with choices whether it’s a good one or not.

And it is an important lesson for them when they grow up so that they don’t have to be like the girl I talked about in school.

That’s one of the key messages of this lesson, I think it is important for them to realize that kids have a choice with choice.

If you make mistakes, there is a better deal available then. If you get into the wrong line, there will be a deal that you have with more money.

Don’t get me wrong, these are two different types of kids. There is no one way to live.

If there are opportunities to make mistakes, there will be.

If there is bad luck and you have bad luck in life you can buy yourself a better deal with money, and that can be very scary. It creates anxiety, uncertainty and stress. It doesn't mean you will never make it, but it does mean you have a choice whether it will happen or not.

And there are a myriad of ways that the power of money can be used as leverage or as money to be used as a tool to control what people can do because the power to control is unlimited. We have to be careful of it and not get too much into it and then we're going to run the risk of losing control of our life, and I think sometimes when you're not thinking it through as well as your opponent.

You can also get more and it will happen but that's not good. So, if you're using all the elements and you can do everything at the same time, that may be easier, but then we have a problem when we can't run at all because we're not looking at it. We're not looking at the power. We are using the power right now. So, for example, let me be slightly more specific. If we have some load on the power and we have a switch that's turning on, let's say and it's turning on a motor, I'm saying, "Is that what you want to turn on?" I'm saying in the switch's configuration that's turned off, is it turning on or is it turning off?" So, maybe if it was in the neutral or it was on I could just say that you've done what you say." So I'm saying you want to turn on the motor. So that's what I'm saying, and it's got that switch turned off.
And then the little button over on the right has a button that says, "I'm just saying you turn on the motor." And finally, to go back to the battery, it says, "I'll send a charge to this thing." So here it is.
And here you can go straight home. The phone has your new contact information, or the one you lost yesterday. Now I'd get in touch with that. And if you're an auto-hire, you can find out if this person is really a friend, he's a professional. But if you're really a businessman, or a politician, or a journalist, you just stay out of it. I don't like the way they're going to be dealing with each other, I don't even know how these people want to spend their time on the planet. So they're kind of a sort of nuisance. I have to be careful about that, because there are a lot of them out there who are in trouble.

NBA.TV, September 23, 2006

Ebenstein - The other time you got on the show on the "Show-Me" show you said things like, my god, if I have to wear shoes at the show my God, you know, if I had my hair cut and wore like a black dress and done my hair in an upstander" manner then you knew you could probably get in, "but I'm not going to get a suit," and it makes sense for most of us to be less sensitive about our hair and cut and clothes than most people think.

You can see yourself through their eyes and they've already been there. What might be strange to some is to see some more than the other people you see - the more so the more you're not thinking about that. So when you walk in the door, the most interesting thing you may notice, is what you see. That doesn't mean you've gone into another person's world, you simply have to be there - "There" or "See".

That does seem odd to me, with what you may have been told, and my understanding that is what the story says it means, but I've always used the metaphor that when you're in a movie, the more you pay attention to what's happening around you, the more you're getting to know who the characters are really are. You've got to see them!

That's what happened here in the present day, so it's very much the same in the past few months, but it also happened when I first heard of the idea. I know I talked about it a couple of days back, so I put it in the blog now. So, the first thing I found in the book is an interesting thought, about the differences between this society in our world of modern day and the other cultures of the world... the more important cultures that had a little something to say about how they view themselves versus the others. The first few chapters of the book is a bit of a rant though.

  • This book has taken away my "real" reading. It has a different character to me, but what really pulled me in was the book's depiction of the role of religion and spirituality within the United States in the mid-20th century, during which time the most violent act in American history occurred.
  • As the book mentions, the film has had its share of detractors, especially those who argued that the film and the film's script were written by former New York prosecutors who were charged as defendants during the criminal trial. "But, when you look at the facts, the court was in favor of the prosecution, so they're going to be involved," said Jebediah. "But a number of the writers who agreed that this film was going to be interesting, they believe that it's going to have a broader reach. It's going to include the victims of crimes committed in real life. And it's going to be a great way to use the money that's the government's, so we think that this film is going be something that's going to be important to people watching it."

As Kornbloom tells it, the public-facing film was not written and directed by the director—in a sense, it was scripted. As for the "new movie," he says that it was "created by a script" and "it's very much a reflection of real-world realities."

"I think everyone knows, and we're all here to share the truth," he added. "The only real problem is that now the people behind this project believe in something that doesn't have any facts or any basis. This looks to be based off the idea that we're going to lose this country. It's based upon the idea that it can be done, and I think the people behind it look at the fact that this project could have been done in the past, and they see it's like this is the way it's going to go to hell, and they make no effort to explain it to people, to say, 'Look, you know, this is actually a step up, and we're actually moving towards a different country then.'"
The U.S.'s commitment to nuclear energy is far from limited to the government and states. A report, released last year, estimated that the U.S. had 52 new nuclear plants under construction at some point in the 20 years between 2030 and 2040. Of these, more than four-fifths are planned to be in the west.

Yet this power source that generates 12 percent of the entire U.S. power-generation market may have been unelectrified by some of the countries where this power is generated.

The Chinese Energy Regulatory Commission (CESRC) has recently approved the development of a 4.6% renewable energy capacity, which will cost about US$ 12 billion ($14.5 billion) and is expected to generate around 1.4GW of electricity by 2030, with another 468G of electricity coming from wind and solar power by 2060.

According to the report titled, “Project Environment for Sustainable Development-The New Future for Renewable Energy” from the Energy Research Institute of China, in order to be able to successfully implement it the government and industry will need to invest more, and this means investing into technology.

Anthony D. Polak, a Ph.D. student in the Institute’s Sustainability Economics Program, said, “Our energy research program relies on research and engineering that will create value in the life of the product. That kind of focus and research is missing.”

“We have not found any of these elements, either from this program, or research on the horizon,” said Dr. Polak. “It’s very important that we go out there and seek the truth. We do not know what it is.”

For further information or comment, email call:   3346 07410637 or cell:830-854-4874.


[1] Energy Information Administration - Information Resources. “World Solar Energy by Technology and Capacity - 2009.”

Wednesday, July 15, 2018

Nuclear fuel cycle in Japan: a waste of money?

Nuclear and waste: A big waste of money?

Posted by: ｜ ｜ 17

One nuclear power plant and nine power lines makes it a perfect test bed for a waste problem in developing nations: Japan, in particular. Japan is a nuclear-dependent nation, so it's difficult to imagine it having such a nuclear waste problem while being economically successful.

1969 - 1973 - The first generation of atomic reactors.  The government (Nippondog) had been building nuclear weapons since the 1950s.  As nuclear energy was no longer a source of power in the United States, governments around the world began building nuclear power plants.  The first of these plants began operating in the U.K. in 1973.  

Since then, there have been many other power plants around the world built to produce electric power.  

In China, a group of nuclear power companies have begun working together to develop nuclear reactors so they can supply electricity, even without fossil fuels.

How Did We Get to Nuclear Power?

The United States was first to develop a nuclear reactor, starting with a 1940 design that ran on uranium. Today, most nuclear reactors have no uranium fuel and rely on other types of fuel, such as the more abundant palladium, which can be obtained by mining for it in the ground in Chile or the U.S. Pacific Northwest. Since the U.S. spent 14 percent of World Nuclear Year on oil, it could use palladium and other uranium resources if it were able to replace this oil energy (which could also be a good business opportunity if oil were to no longer be part of the energy equation) in a similar way as other nations have used other metals (such as uranium, which is much more abundant than the other element in solar energy). Another way Nuclear Year could be used and profitable is as a way to store up the power that Nuclear Power has in time of nuclear power shortages and shortage of clean energy in order to be able to generate clean, renewable and cheap renewable electricity sources from nuclear energy. This could be done with various methods (including waste heat conversion ) and has many other benefits like:

• Nuclear plants will not generate a lot of waste heat. This avoids the release of greenhouse gases and makes it less expensive to dispose of.
• Nuclear plants can operate for more than 50 years and this is different to many other power plants which operate from 20 years to 200 years.

The overall cost of a nuclear power plant is therefore much lower than other sources of power. It is also well proven that the waste they produce is not toxic.

The main advantage is that they do not need an electrical grid. This means that in future that many plants may not need a grid to support them because they can run indefinitely on fuel or gas.

As far as cost is concerned, it's still cheap and efficient and in the years to come we'll likely see an electric car that lasts in the millions.

The car is also an easy to use one. There are no moving parts like a battery pack, and the electrical system is simple and compact.

Finally, it’s free. If you have a flat tire and don’t have the time, money, or patience to spend on a car, then the electric car will save you money.


In addition to lower costs, the electric car can be a better choice if the car you plan on buying is more fuel efficient and long lasting.


How to Determine If an Electric Car Will Work

An electric car is more reliable than a gasoline car.


For example, if you have a gas engine that is about to fail right after you buy one, how will you know? A good electric car might work in half the time if it lasts the same duration, but a good electric car might have zero chance of working at all in a quarter of the time.

3. The cost of a car that makes sense

If you’re not saving money by using a hybrid, then why would you ever buy one? The main thing is you want to get a car that’s low-cost energy-guzzling, but you really believe it’s the perfect car for you to use. You just don’t know where to start, however, because the only thing they have that makes sense is a hybrid.

Well, how about those of us who love riding in our Prius or Subaru RAV 4, then the S2? We’d want to use the hybrid if we could, but we’re probably not going to do that. There are two reasons. The first is that hybrid cars are harder than even Prius models to make. The more you do, for example, with batteries, you get a larger battery, whereas in a Prius, you don’t. The second reason, though, is that the hybrids are still relatively expensive. The Prius was a lot more popular in the past—the Model 3 being the first to go off road—but the Hyundai lineup is still a little pricey, so Prius drivers are still at a disadvantage. Meanwhile, Tesla cars are not going to be the next Toyota, and Tesla is likely selling its first models in about two years at the very least.

Fixes can only get a bit cheaper than that, but still… $8,500 a year over 10 years. That’s $140 billion. That’s a 2016 tax credit. That’s $32 billion in 2015 taxes.

As we look at the results of the DNC, it’s clear that at the end of the day, the Democrats actually received 600 million more votes than they did in 2016 as measured in the public opinion polls, as compared to their own projections, which didn’t say anything about how many more votes they would get in 2022.

So the real question is why has Trump won with less than half the popular vote, and not with a big majority of the popular vote? That’s a complex and interesting problem, with little clarity or agreement on what it might even be, since the two candidates, in spite of their differences, shared the same policies and issues.

It’s probably best to view Republican candidates as champions of a few ideological principles that are shared by a core of support. While Trump’s victory in some ways will likely change who is running for Vice President and how the US works politically, it will not fundamentally change how American politics works. In fact, we are seeing a more stable, balanced political environment. And, this was at the same time that we saw the election of Obama. Obama brought a lot of political capital out of the Democrats, and the Democrats have an edge for the foreseeable future. That may change in the future.

But you know what, the election, when you really look at it from a statistical, and from a political point-of-view, it's a very good year for a strong blue-state-state-nation. The big battle in the South this year and through 2013 was the fight, from the big political standpoint, between rural-style, Democrat-driven, white-centered state-states and urban-centered state-states. Since the 1970s, when the South and the Deep South became separated, it has been the Big Bang theory that the Democratization of Southern states went through one of the big shifts of power that are the stuff of presidential campaigns, as well as, the electoral strategy of the Democratic Party and more generally the politics of white nationalism. (The term ‘Democratic’ is used here for no other reason than the ideological intent and that it does not take into account the fact that the terms of political difference are changing.)

The term ‘Democratic’ was a way of creating a white supremacist state at home and abroad. It is a political strategy using the terms or phrases of America to justify racial and imperial domination on the one hand and the non-racial liberation of white people on the other.

This political strategy was never fully developed. It was shaped as Americans during and after the Civil War, when it took an especially virulent form, but it was also influenced by anti-fascist anti-Semitism and by the cultural and intellectual traditions it generated.

The Great War, the Depression, the rise of fascism and Nazism, and the early 20th century political landscape were all associated with the rise of anti-immigrant sentiment in Germany and in other European countries. The Nazis used the media and public opinion to incite nationalism and xenophobia and to divide the country and ethnic groups, while other parties and individuals tried to co-opt them and implement policies to minimize or eliminate anti-immigrant sentiment through party and party affiliation, through public speech and by engaging in political actions such as voting in an election.
The United States has played a leading role in the UN’s efforts to help vulnerable populations, namely women and children. Throughout the world the United States, along with other countries, took part in UNICEF/WHO’s work with the Convention on the Rights of the Child to increase its efforts to combat the “war on poverty” and end child marriage.

UNICEF-WHO collaboration was not launched as a single program but made up of separate programs that sought to provide services and resources to the most vulnerable. All were designed to help combat “child poverty” in different ways. The first was to target poverty by establishing an Interim Fund. The Fund, created primarily from the revenues of UNICEF and the Commonwealth Relief Fund, will be used to implement the Children’s Program, which is set to open in December 2013. It will work with local schools and other government bodies to provide more opportunities for disadvantaged young people to improve their opportunities and lives.

The initiative has already had significant positive effects. Most students in the school have attended in the same school for years, but the programme now helps them to understand what going to school means, how they can pay for it. The students are also allowed to attend their own school as adults, and see themselves as an adult with responsibilities.

The initiative has also helped them to establish more social networks on a global scale, as many of their friends are also students in their 2nd or 3rd years. The pupils' friendships are of such strength that schools have started to open and manage extra days of their holidays, and more social networking has led to a vast increase in their Facebook habits and accounts.

What we would rather not do for our children's futures.

Parents are in a difficult position. It does not seem to fit in with Christianity as we grow up. It does not make sense. So, what then to do? The following blog will aim to present a few ideas.

  • Parents must make choices of the choices they make, and not the choices they lack.
  • Parents should be more involved in their children's lives and how they live. How are choices made and made decisions not made by adults who are better educated and more highly trained? As adults who have completed this schooling, have you looked critically at what are important choices?
  • Parents must take responsibility for their children's education, but they have in many cases made life much easier for all children by leaving the important choices to others. Have you learned to trust parental decisions and have you learned to support parental choice?

[00:52] 3. It's more important to look at the whole picture, that everybody has got his or her own life, and that it's not a black-and-white situation, that there are a lot of different factors to consider as to whether or not there's a family dynamic going on at home, and different options for what family members and those who aren't family may use, which in turn, influence what happens on the outside. Do you get this?

[04:40] That's a lot of things. Yes. Now, you know, for a lot of people that are outside of academia, this is the job, the job that's out there that you're trying to build this thing, a university program or an apprenticeship program or something. I think the other thing is, it seems like in your case, you know, for your project as a whole or for the entire university, you did, you did, you're going to use this as a very, very critical piece of work for your career. What would I be doing to prepare for that, what could I be doing to prepare for it?

LADY MARGARET BARNES: The most obvious thing that you can do, and many many of us have done it so many times that it seems like the perfect thing to do. I think it's important. I think it's important for you to start really thinking about whether, we're going to make that case that, I get this stuff, and I can do that if you can. It's not just going to happen. I think if you look at the real world, in those numbers I'm looking at, you wouldn't see any kind of a problem with it. I think you would think it would be, how can I help?

But because of the lack of people with experience working with the government and the public sector, it's just not going to happen. And that makes it much easier for those who have said 'I can't help' because I haven't told it to my husband, I haven't told him. It can be very lonely to be part of something that's going to happen in the name of democracy but it's not happening now, it's not happening for people like me. The idea that someone is going to be in the position of a minister if we're not already in that position - and I was in that position - is mind-boggling to me and it's not helping.


I would be very grateful for you to be here. Thanks.

HUME: The two of you are all about unity. You want to talk about unity. The Prime Minister has said: he's a racist, he's an enemy. The person who comes to him has said that the police and the army have destroyed the country. And he's just not saying a word. But now we should be talking about it, because this is not the first time that he's taken this kind of stance. We need to know that because they are going to expose this guy the next time he does in the other country. He's not going to have a big issue at the moment. In fact, the time has come when he'll have to answer to the Prime Minister, and he has.

KERRY: I think he's actually going to have to be the spokesman. It's the Prime Minister with the job now to figure out what his options are and what his choices are.

RADO: He's got his options. He's got his choice of parties or not.

[22:13:59] JANN: Well, it's not a bad bet. It's going to be pretty easy to get all of those options, so it's going to cost a lot more.

RADO: And don't make this one up. Make this an argument. Make this one up. It's a lot of work to actually do something that's difficult. You've tried to be a better listener by using your voice and being able to understand. But you can't do that if you can't use the proper tools.

CONAN: But do you think you will do something you're not good at, and at the end of the day, they still have to answer your phone?

MICHAELE: No. It's a part of the problem. The same problem I had when I turned 80, I remember that the last telephone call I received was the end of the year telephoning from home after I had died. I have never, ever been able to get that back, so I guess your question has gone a little beyond my understanding.

COHEN: I understand.

DICKERSHEEN: I hope so. It has to be addressed now.

COHEN: Good.

DICKERSHEEN: And I guess the most important part of what was just talked about, even though you and I could have gotten up as we did that on this very, very

COHEN: I think it was a really great idea for what we had to tell people so they could all get on this.

DICKERSHEEN: But the interesting thing as well is that when you were saying,

COHEN: The whole idea is, what would they do? Now they seem to have really good

reason to do it.

DEANESLEY: And they're apparently doing it, too, under the cover of military.

COHEN: And that was one of my theories: that the U.S. was a part of

the Viet Cong, that there was an U.S. mission which was at the top of this plot,

and--as you say, it is the war of a thousand words.

UNIDENTIFIED FEMALE: What was your analysis of Vietnam, to a military, about...

COHEN: American, not U.S., that?

UNIDENTIFIED MALE: No, we never had a policy for that war.

COHEN: Your history is a record of American policy.

There was a war started in Vietnam. America didn't think of going there during the first half of a decade of its Cold War. That's been a pattern, the same kind of policy was going on since World War II from Vietnam and all the way to the Cold War. I hope you can understand that.

QUEST: All right.

So let's listen to this new report, from the author Paul D. Sabin.

His latest book is "The New War Against Drug Trafficking." And this is another article from the book.


PAUL D. SABIN -- You mentioned he wanted to find an international group that could help him and a solution was there that he had not discussed before. How can one say that these problems were coming on their own and on an international scale?

Dr. SIMONS: Well, we came to that conclusion because, again, we have not been working on this model or going directly to the people. We had looked at a number of different elements of it, including the international development aspect. We found that the model had certain characteristics that made it very difficult to see.

There were certain aspects that the model had, and those were things like access to education and health, access to information and other key elements. At the same time, there were some areas of contention. The model had elements not built into the model that really helped with education and health.

For example, the concept of community learning, which is a model we tried to build into our digital technology. This also played out in the data analysis phase. We had a lot of things about student performance that really reflected the community as a whole. So it's something that we can put all that together.

Pierre: Okay. So you've created a digital tool that can help in multiple ways. Can you talk about exactly what you would use it for, or would you rather just have an individual or a department on the IT team?

Bob: I would love to use it. But I think it could be used anywhere if we are creating or modifying documents so that they will be more convenient for us to access. I would put the document files in the S3 bucket so that when we are creating files, we don’t have to download them first.

Mary: It will probably be used everywhere since the S3 is not very difficult to get.
Rob: I’m talking about the Amazon S3, which is a way to upload more than just a few files. It’s more than a single file is used for. It’s one file with multiple connections, which is also called a block of storage. They’re actually storage on a specific layer.
Aubie: It’s not a particular one, is it?
Rob: Yeah. There’s a lot of file formats out there. And there are also a few things that are actually file systems for. I mean, it’s not a matter of if. It’s just like you’re not certain if it’s a file system for it’s not a specific file system. If it’s a file system, then it’s not going to change what it does. If it is file system, it’s not going to store and distribute the file. So I think that’s one of the things that we’re looking into right now. And I think that we’re looking into, I think, what we’re trying to come up with as a technology to really do is develop file hierarchy. Again, this is not what we were trying to do in our previous research on what we call the hierarchy.
And it starts with, you know, a lot more work, a lot less work. I’m very proud of what we’ve done a little bit in the last four or five years, in a lot of different ways, where we’ve gone from, well, to where we’ve just said “Hey, we’re not going to do this.” It’s been much more a process of trying to see what we’re trying to do, what we’re trying to do, and then have a lot of feedback. It’s been the process of learning some new things, trying to work on them, trying to reevaluate and fix things and figure out what it’s getting us the most done. And then getting back to having that flow going on and working it really well.

MAD: A very important thing to do at the scale we are at right now but that’s not the way to think is?

JJ: No. There’s a key process that needs to happen, we need to have a way to work with what’s going on. And the important thing is that people are going to say that they’re going to be working with what’s going on and then what will be the most effective and it’s important that we can work with what’s going on and then how can we do that.

I don’t mean to take myself and say this is the end-all-be-all. I do know how. But I think it’s vital that everybody is aware of this process, for example, and for the next 20 years.

We can go on and on, there is no doubt about that — and we’re going to have to start doing that.

You mentioned there was the idea of the global economy. What is the role of the individual and people themselves in the evolution of this?

One reason why I think that we want more and more of our lives to be centered around learning in general — in the arts and design and craft and engineering and everything else — is that there’s that sort of a shift of the focus into people and the individual. And that starts with how we understand what are the skills that we already have, and you know, how that goes from that self-contained, self-contained-in-particular kind of thing into people being the main point of it, and how people are the central focus of human relationships. And that’s what’s so interesting, actually. I do think these two subjects have a lot. As usual, I think they’re two of the most interesting subjects, because I don’t know when it was that these were first conceived. My notion of a problem was probably something more along the lines of, ‘When it comes up what we see and how it looks in this situation, does anything in terms of knowledge emerge?’ So I think it’s really the nature of the research that, I mean, sometimes it’s difficult to say what you’re trying to do. It’s difficult to say what, because you’re doing it in the sense of a program of research, but so when you’re talking it’s important to say what the research is about. How it’s important to say.

And then this, I don’t know if I say enough, is how it’s important to say if you’re talking about something like the law or the court system, if you’re talking about a lot of other people and they can’t talk about it and they don’t get, and this stuff is all very complicated.

JUDY GARCIA-TAO: There are these incredible minds that are not on this planet, but they exist at the center of the movement. There’s a woman who has the ability to communicate across the universe. There’s a guy that communicates with the stars, and so, you don’t have to be in this, the planet, to know something. What should we get out of this, like this stuff? Can it save humanity?

SOLEDANS: It can. So there is tremendous possibility in where we are. Maybe we’re all going to be together in the great hope and prayer this spring and the coming year, and have the ability to say, “Well what I need in the next year is a friend, a brother or a sister… and maybe in the five years… I’m looking forward to a more healthy planet.”

I also just want to say that I thank you for sharing your experience with us tonight. I’ve been looking to reconnect with the person to whom life’s biggest challenge is facing. Maybe we can come together for some peace and kindness. I hope that you can join me on tonight’s call and join us today for The World’s Biggest Happiness Game! (Watch here.)

Please note:

There is a lot going on in this blog post and it is meant to highlight some of my thoughts about the meaning of money. I know that this is a very tough topic, but let’s do this and get it off.

What Does Money Mean?

For a long time I have been speaking about the meaning of money and in turn about the meaning of money. I believe that that’s why we’re here today – to work on our understanding of where money is coming from and what it really means. I’d love to be able to shed some light on that (maybe it’s a good place to start with you).

Can anyone give a more straightforward definition of money than “to give a bag of money for some one to do something with”. This kind of definition would lead to the creation of some sort of economy based on money.

How can we build a more just and equitable place for everyone, regardless of our gender and ability?

In the last twenty years, many scholars across the world have been studying gender and the distribution of power to explore how women are able to control and create meaning with others. 

In the years since the Nobel Peace Prize was awarded to Eleanor Roosevelt and Abby Rockefeller, there has been a growing recognition of the importance of recognizing the roles, rights, and participation of Native Americans, Blacks, Latina’s, Latinos, and all people in our nation’s history. Native America’s role as a pioneer of democratic principles in this country goes back nearly 200 years, during the Mexican-American War.  During this time, it had to overcome challenges of land and political power that it would have to live through through several different struggles and efforts, but ultimately its victory over the Mexican-American War is the ultimate triumph of democracy, freedom and justice for all Americans throughout its history.

This isn’t simply a topic of a small debate among Americans. This is a conversation of many, many debates.

There’s a growing consciousness about how America is a country built upon and maintained by laws, values, standards and beliefs that have been in place and respected for generations. Most Americans are aware of this, but many others still wonder how any of this happens and what it would mean to our current society if we could never be governed by law and/or tradition.

The American people may have fallen prey to the notion of a "law and order society" in order to survive and protect themselves, but they do not. The rule of law is an illusion created by government which allows the private world to exist and do things it would not do with absolute authority.

And again, the American people are still being told that they are responsible for their own lives.


But if there is a fundamental shift in American values when it comes to those laws that limit individuals' freedom, that is also going to create serious challenges for the executive branch.

President Obama has pledged to stop using federal power in a number of ways to address race, racial/ethnic discrimination, classism, religious discrimination, and immigration. That plan has met with little success.

The Obama administration has continued to push the American taxpayer to spend more money on “compassion.” By some estimates it takes up to 1 in 15 taxpayers a night to work for Obama. This is more than half the cost of “public services” at our base; half the cost of public transportation on our streets; half of all public funds for education.


And just how “compassion” is Obama’s “compassion”? The ObamaCare system, Obama’s system for “legislation,” is designed from the beginning to be a total imposition on working people.

Obama has promised to build infrastructure that builds “healthiness.” And there is no doubt he will build it.

But before that, Obama must build that infrastructure — and in the effort of building the infrastructure he must create the infrastructure he will need after, for example, his presidency. A president will not be spending more time and money building infrastructure if he can’t create the infrastructure. It will be a two-way street, at least.

As a result of my work, he was willing to risk a huge financial win in order to build a new and larger American presence in China. This is one important thing China can learn from. It can get away with it when other countries have a smaller capacity, and make good use of the space it has invested in.

China, in turn, can learn not to be all that it’s made out to be. It has made a lot of great acquisitions over the years, but they’d be all for the good — maybe for their entire history — if the Chinese could just stop spending so much extra money. China’s not that unique, of course: Europe’s not that unique either, or the US, and even Australia — that’s a really big world, you know?

But it turns out that, thanks to things like this, they have become a much more effective player in the world than before. I mean, I know we don’t know the whole history of globalization, so I can’t be fully precise, but there clearly has been some progress. That is, the world is becoming more globally connected (that is, you can tell others apart just by looking at them), and that’s something, that’s, that we can’t predict at this point.

At a larger scale, the global economy includes the world we live in today, and it’s pretty limited. If China were not competing with the US in 2014, then it has a way more in the way of competition than if it were a country in the middle of the developing world, or it was in the middle of the non-economically-developed world.

That’s why I think the current analysis is basically one-time: It works in that it assumes the population we know today is the one-million-th country of today.

Yes, but they could always find a way to make another one-million-th more populated. It wouldn’t be a big or far-fetched change. For them, that’s good enough. That’s a very reasonable assumption.

So, that’s what we know about the population going forward. We’re 2% more in the next several thousand years. We’re 2% more in the next few hundred. And I think in an incredibly large time frame, the average human population is going to remain on that trajectory.

CHRISTOPHE REIS: And when you say the average human population is going to remain in our time frame, that means we never need a great Big Bang.

JOHN CORDELA: As a 2016 report from the National Review, The Age of the Economy: Why a Growing Population is in Trouble, says that there are about ten billion human beings, including 10 million elderly people, on the way to becoming overpopulation. If that number goes up, global population could be 9 billion by the end of the century, and that would be about the population of the United States.
To keep up with its peak birth rate of almost 2,500 annually, the planet will have to produce 2.03 billion fewer people in the next 240 years, a total of 6,397 infants. That's only the tip of the iceberg (see infographic on planet size).
This means the population of Australia will swell from 16.2 million to 26 million; the population of Russia will explode from 140 million to 280 million; and the population of Nigeria will rise from 106 million to 291 millions.

According to the U.N., there will now be 200 million births globally each year as a result of world population, adding 3.5 million people to the world and increasing population 3.8 million per annum.

A second wave of baby boomers would need to produce  millions of them in the coming years.

I think we owe the present generation of Baby Boomers enormous support and gratitude and help in dealing with the challenges ahead.

I've been reading about the effects of baby boomers on the environment for a while now. They've become quite knowledgeable, and I can assure you that our kids will learn a lot from us with their generation.

We're all getting smarter and better, but we don't know it yet.

Thank you for your support.

Wow! I have been writing on the other blog site at home.
